footer.tagline: Surface protection standards inspired by German engineering — delivered across Türkiye.

hero.sub: Paint protection film, paintless dent repair, and scratch correction — the same standard, the same warranty, the same discipline since 1987.

services.heading: One roof. Three disciplines.
services.sub: Every application follows the same protocol, uses the same material grade, and ships with the same warranty card.

ppf.title: Paint Protection Film (PPF)
ppf.summary: Self-healing TPU layer — invisible armor against stone chips, scratches, and UV.
ppf.heroCopy: PPF is a transparent protective layer that encapsulates your paintwork. Micro-scratches self-heal with heat; stone chips, road salt, and UV pass over it — leaving the paint underneath untouched.
ppf.spec4Value: Full body: 3–5 days, per panel: 1 day

dent.title: Paintless Dent Repair (PDR)
dent.summary: Dent removal without disturbing the paint — factory finish preserved.
dent.b2: Hail damage, door dings, parking knocks
dent.heroCopy: PDR uses specialized tools to push the dent back to its original form from behind the panel. No paintwork, no filler; resale value is preserved and the job completes in hours, not days.
dent.spec2Value: Full recovery if paint is intact
dent.spec4Value: Panels with cracked or torn paint fall outside PDR

scratch.title: Scratch Correction
scratch.summary: Spot paint, cut-and-polish, and ceramic finishing — surface restoration.
scratch.b1: Only the affected area is worked
scratch.b2: Color match: via OEM paint code
scratch.heroCopy: Scratches are approached by depth: clear-coat-only scratches lift with cut-and-polish; scratches into base paint are spot-painted. The intervention is localized — the full panel is never repainted unnecessarily.

combo.title: Combined Packages
combo.summary: Scratch + PPF, Dent + PPF, or the triple combo — full restoration in a single visit.

heritage.heading: The same discipline since 1987.
heritage.p1: VonGuard was founded in Germany by a team working on surface-protection technologies. Our philosophy is straightforward: engineer materials that hold up to autobahn speeds and northern winters, document the application protocols, and stand behind the outcome.
heritage.p2: That same standard is now delivered to Turkish drivers through the Türkiye representative — the same materials, the same application discipline, the same warranty durations.

process.heading: Four steps, one standard.
process.step1Body: Pre-consultation based on your vehicle's model, color, and current state.
process.step2Body: Paint depth measurement, panel-level damage map, photographed pre-report.
process.step3Body: Class-controlled room, regulated temperature, documented protocol.
process.step4Body: Physical warranty card + digital record — traceable for up to 10 years.
